compiled_state.title: RED: Create behavioral test for pre-commit test quality gate
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Create test file that exercises the pre-commit test quality gate with anti-pattern fixtures.

### Steps
1. Create tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-quality-gate.sh
2. Test cases: (a) test file with cat/grep of source file → gate blocks, (b) test file with behavioral assertion → gate passes, (c) gate gracefully degrades when no tools installed, (d) gate respects config disabled setting
3. Tests must FAIL (RED state — hook doesn't exist yet)
4. Add .test-index entry + RED marker
5. chmod +x the test file

### File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-quality-gate.sh — Create
- .test-index — Edit

## Testing Mode
RED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-quality-gate.sh
- [ ] Tests FAIL against missing hook (RED state)
  Verify: { bash tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-quality-gate.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"; }

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Tests written, review in progress. Resume from review cycle.
